review: The best place in North Bangalore for Neuro diverse support. Their unique way of working with kids will help to grow naturally.
We have been continuing therapy at Creating Links for a year, and I am truly impressed by their professionalism and dedication.
We've had a wonderful experience with Creating Links. The team is caring, professional, and truly dedicated to each child's progress.
The therapists are very much child friendly and conduct various events for the kids. Highly recommend for holistic child development.
Excellent therapy centre with caring professionals who genuinely understand children's needs. Very happy with the progress our child has made.
